title: SmartyGUI
description: A Minecraft b1.7.3 modification for Fabric that adds a bunch of useful client-side things to the game!
body:
# SmartyGUI

SmartyGUI — a Minecraft b1.7.3 modification for ModLoader/Fabric that adds a bunch of useful client-side things to the game!

Currently, it adds:
```
    - Block/Entity Viewer HUD.
    - Extended F3.
    - Armor Status HUD.
    - In-Game Tooltip.
```


HUD Example Showcase             |  Colour Settings
